title: COrigami: An AI Pipeline for Co-Designing Flat-Foldable Visually Recognisable Origami
summary: COrigami是一种AI驱动的折纸设计流水线，通过自然语言生成折痕图案，满足几何与美学约束实现协同创作。
highlights: 端到端AI管道从语义简笔画生成折纸折痕
利用强化学习与美学评估循环优化模型
实现数学严格可折叠性与视觉识别度的协同设计
score_reason: AI驱动的折纸设计，融合自然语言、几何与RL
author: Tom Zahavy, Shaobo Hou, Thomas Tumiel, James Doran, Francesco Faccio, Xidong Feng, Alex Havrilla, Igor Khytryi, Chenglei Li, Lisa Schut, Vivek Veeriah, Arijan Abrashi, Micha{\l} Kosmulski, Robert J. Lang, Nick Robinson, Brandon Wong, Marcus Chiam, Gloria Fang, Satinder Singh
